name: Private Tutor
description: Your personal AI tutor. Generates quizzes to assess your understanding, creates custom lessons targeting your weak spots, and tracks your progress over time with spaced repetition.
author: ultralight

context_sources.label: Study subject progress
context_sources.description: Subjects, concept counts, mastery, strengths, and weaknesses for widget grounding.
context_sources.query: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.description, s.updated_at, sp.avg_score, sp.quiz_count, sp.strengths, sp.weaknesses FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN student_profiles sp ON sp.subject_id = s.id AND sp.user_id = :user_id WHERE s.user_id = :user_id AND (s.name LIKE :query OR s.description LIKE :query OR sp.strengths LIKE :query OR sp.weaknesses LIKE :query) ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC LIMIT :limit

context_sources.label: Recent quiz history
context_sources.description: Recent quiz sessions and scores for review, lesson, and progress context.
context_sources.query: SELECT qs.id, qs.status, qs.score_pct, qs.total_questions, qs.correct_count, qs.started_at, qs.completed_at, s.name AS subject_name FROM quiz_sessions qs LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = qs.subject_id AND s.user_id = :user_id WHERE qs.user_id = :user_id AND (qs.status LIKE :query OR s.name LIKE :query) ORDER BY COALESCE(qs.completed_at, qs.started_at, qs.generated_at) DESC LIMIT :limit

prompt_examples: show recent quiz scores and weak areas

context_sources.label: Study lessons
context_sources.description: Generated lessons, statuses, covered concepts, and subject names.
context_sources.query: SELECT l.id, l.title, l.status, l.weak_concepts, l.created_at, s.name AS subject_name FROM lessons l LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = l.subject_id AND s.user_id = :user_id WHERE l.user_id = :user_id AND (l.title LIKE :query OR l.weak_concepts LIKE :query OR s.name LIKE :query) ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT :limit

prompt_examples: show unread lessons for weak concepts

suggested_components.title: Quiz setup
suggested_components.description: Pick the subject, topic, and question count before starting.

prompt_examples: make me a practice quiz interface for my weakest topic

agent_actions.label: Show quiz setup
agent_actions.description: Return to the quiz setup view with topic input and subject picker.
agent_actions.expected_result: The quiz setup view is visible.

agent_actions.label: Focus quiz topic
agent_actions.description: Focus the topic input and optionally prefill a requested topic.
agent_actions.expected_result: The quiz topic field is focused.

agent_actions.label: Start selected subject quiz
agent_actions.description: Start a quiz for the currently selected subject.
agent_actions.expected_result: A quiz session starts in the widget.

agent_actions.label: Open related lesson
agent_actions.description: Open the lesson generated from the current quiz result.
agent_actions.expected_result: The Lessons widget opens to the generated lesson.

suggested_components.title: Subject mastery
suggested_components.description: Compare subjects by mastery, quiz count, strengths, and weaknesses.

suggested_components.title: Recent study activity
suggested_components.description: Show recent quizzes and generated lessons in order.

prompt_examples: build a study dashboard for what I should review next

agent_actions.label: Focus new study topic
agent_actions.description: Open the new topic input and optionally prefill a topic.
agent_actions.expected_result: The new topic field is visible and focused.

agent_actions.label: Open next pending quiz
agent_actions.description: Open the first pending quiz from the progress dashboard.
agent_actions.expected_result: The Quiz widget opens to a pending quiz when one exists.

agent_actions.label: Open latest unread lesson
agent_actions.description: Open the first unread lesson from the progress dashboard.
agent_actions.expected_result: The Lessons widget opens to the unread lesson when one exists.

suggested_components.title: Lesson queue
suggested_components.description: Show generated lessons and the weak concepts they cover.

suggested_components.title: Lesson detail
suggested_components.description: Show the selected lesson content and follow-up quiz actions.

prompt_examples: show lessons for weak concepts from my last quiz

agent_actions.label: Open selected lesson
agent_actions.description: Open the current or first available lesson.
agent_actions.expected_result: A lesson detail view is visible.

agent_actions.label: Next lesson page
agent_actions.description: Advance to the next page in the current lesson.
agent_actions.expected_result: The next lesson page is visible when available.

agent_actions.label: Start lesson quiz
agent_actions.description: Open the Quiz widget for the current lesson subject.
agent_actions.expected_result: The Quiz widget opens for the lesson subject.

agent_actions.label: Focus lesson topic
agent_actions.description: Focus the new lesson topic input and optionally prefill a requested topic.
agent_actions.expected_result: The lesson topic field is focused.

quick_start.description: Instantly start studying a topic or uploaded material. Extracts subject + concepts via AI, creates them in your library, and returns everything ready for quizzing or lessons.

prompt_examples: help me start studying a new topic

file_content.description: Base64 data URL of uploaded file content

count.description: Number of concepts to extract (default: auto 3-8)

mode.description: Mode: 'quiz' (start quiz after), 'lesson' (generate lesson after), 'setup' (just create concepts)

returns.description: Subject ID, concept list, and summary

add_concept.description: Add a concept to study. Concepts can be organized hierarchically with parent-child relationships.

parent_id.description: Parent concept ID for creating hierarchies

subject.description: Subject this concept belongs to (auto-created if new)

rate.description: Rate your understanding of a concept (1-5). Used for spaced repetition scheduling.

study.description: Get concepts to review next, prioritized by spaced repetition. Low-understanding and stale concepts appear first.

returns.description: Prioritized list of concepts to review

tree.description: View the concept hierarchy as a tree structure.

start_quiz.description: Start an interactive quiz session. Returns a session ID and the first question. Questions target weak areas using spaced repetition data and student profile.

prompt_examples: start a quiz for weak concepts

subject_id.description: Quiz on concepts from this subject

concept_ids.description: Specific concept IDs to quiz on

returns.description: Session ID and first question with options

submit_answer.description: Submit an answer for a quiz question. For MC questions, provide the letter (A-D). For open-ended questions, provide your written answer. AI grades open-ended responses with score (1-5), feedback, and misconception detection.

user_answer.description: Answer letter (A-D) for MC, or written response for open-ended

returns.description: Correctness, score (1-5), feedback, misconceptions, and next question

complete_quiz.description: Complete a quiz session. Calculates score, updates student profile, identifies weak areas, and optionally generates a lesson.

returns.description: Score, per-concept breakdown, weak/strong areas, and auto-generated lesson if score is low

generate_lesson.description: Generate a personalized lesson targeting specific weak concepts. Can be triggered after a quiz or manually for any concepts.

prompt_examples: generate a lesson for concepts I missed

quiz_session_id.description: Generate lesson based on quiz wrong answers

returns.description: Lesson content in markdown with title and concepts covered

quiz.description: Generate a quick quiz (legacy — prefer start_quiz for interactive sessions).

subject_id.description: Quiz on concepts from this subject

concept_ids.description: Specific concept IDs to quiz on

returns.description: Quiz questions with options, answers, and explanations

status.description: Overview of subjects, concepts, mastery levels, recent quiz scores, and student profile strengths/weaknesses.

prompt_examples: show my study progress and weak areas

returns.description: Comprehensive study stats with per-subject mastery

conventions_get.description: Get study conventions and progress notes that are injected as AI context.

conventions_set.description: Set a study convention or progress note.

widget_quiz_ui.description: Quiz widget UI — interactive card-swipe quiz interface.

widget_quiz_data.description: Quiz widget data — handles quick_start, quiz start, answer submission, and completion.

action.description: Action: subjects, quick_start, start, answer, complete

widget_progress_ui.description: Study progress widget UI — mastery bars, quiz history, strengths/weaknesses.

widget_progress_data.description: Study progress widget data. Supports quick_start action for onboarding.

action.description: Action: quick_start or omit for status

widget_lessons_ui.description: Lessons widget UI — browse and read personalized lessons.

widget_lessons_data.description: Lessons widget data — list, fetch, quick_start, or generate_lesson.

action.description: Action: quick_start, generate_lesson, or omit for list

returns.description: Lesson list or single lesson content
